description: xor_num returns a ^ b — comfortable with the bitwise XOR operator
xor_encrypt turns each letter into ord(c) and XORs with the key, returning a list of numbers
xor_decrypt XORs each number with the same key and chr's it back, so decrypt(encrypt(msg, key), key) returns the original
Understands encrypt returns numbers and decrypt returns a string, clear names, a return on every function
